### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1972%E2%80%9373_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Chimia Suceava* was renamed as [CSM Suceava](/wiki/CSM_Suceava "CSM Suceava").

*ITA Pașcani* was moved from [Pașcani](/wiki/Pa%C8%99cani "Pașcani") to [Iași](/wiki/Ia%C8%99i "Iași") and was renamed as [ITA Iași](/w/index.php?title=ITA_Ia%C8%99i&action=edit&redlink=1 "ITA Iași (page does not exist)").

*Automobilul Focșani* was renamed as [Unirea Focșani](/wiki/CSM_Foc%C8%99ani "CSM Focșani").

*Șoimii Buzău* merged with *Tarom București*, moved from [Buzău](/wiki/Buz%C4%83u "Buzău") to [București](/wiki/Bucure%C8%99ti "București") and was renamed as [Șoimii Tarom București](/w/index.php?title=%C8%98oimii_Tarom_Bucure%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Șoimii Tarom București (page does not exist)").

*SUT Galați* was renamed as [Constructorul Galați](/wiki/Constructorul_Gala%C8%9Bi "Constructorul Galați").

*Dacia Galați* was renamed as [Oțelul Galați](/wiki/O%C8%9Belul_Gala%C8%9Bi "Oțelul Galați").

*Unirea Tricolor Brăila* was renamed as [Chimia Brăila](/w/index.php?title=Chimia_Br%C4%83ila&action=edit&redlink=1 "Chimia Brăila (page does not exist)").

*Metalurgistul Brăila* was renamed as [Viitorul Brăila](/w/index.php?title=Viitorul_Br%C4%83ila&action=edit&redlink=1 "Viitorul Brăila (page does not exist)").

*Comerțul Alexandria* was renamed as [Automatica Alexandria](/wiki/CSM_Alexandria "CSM Alexandria").

*Sporting Roșiori* was renamed as [CFR Roșiori](/w/index.php?title=Rova_Ro%C8%99iori&action=edit&redlink=1 "Rova Roșiori (page does not exist)").

*Gorjul Târgu Jiu* was renamed as [Cimentul Târgu Jiu](/w/index.php?title=Cimentul_T%C3%A2rgu_Jiu&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cimentul Târgu Jiu (page does not exist)").

*Foresta Susenii Bârgăului* was moved from [Susenii Bârgăului](/wiki/Susenii_B%C3%A2rg%C4%83ului "Susenii Bârgăului") to [Bistrița](/wiki/Bistri%C8%9Ba "Bistrița") and was renamed as [Foresta Bistrița](/w/index.php?title=Foresta_Bistri%C8%9Ba&action=edit&redlink=1 "Foresta Bistrița (page does not exist)").

*Politehnica Brașov* was renamed as [CSU Brașov](/w/index.php?title=CSU_Bra%C8%99ov_(football)&action=edit&redlink=1 "CSU Brașov (football) (page does not exist)").

*Independența Sibiu* was moved from [Sibiu](/wiki/Sibiu "Sibiu") to [Cisnădie](/wiki/Cisn%C4%83die "Cisnădie") and was renamed as [Independența Cisnădie](/wiki/Independen%C8%9Ba_Cisn%C4%83die "Independența Cisnădie").
